nasb.text: Now the king of Aram had commanded the thirty-two captains of his chariots, saying, “Do not fight with small or great, but with the king of Israel alone.”

esv.text: Now the king of Syria had commanded the thirty-two captains of his chariots, “Fight with neither small nor great, but only with the king of Israel.”

cnv.text: 亞蘭王曾經囑咐他的三十二個戰車長說：“無論大小將兵，你們都不要與他們爭戰，只要與以色列王爭戰。”

ccb.text: 亚兰王已经吩咐他的三十二名战车长不要跟对方的大小军兵交锋，只攻击以色列王。
